question: Are you planning to vote this year?
script_options: {"Hi {firstName}! This is {texterFirstName} from Staging Test Org. We're reaching out to ask about your plans for the upcoming election. Are you planning to vote this year?"}
{"That's great to hear! We can help you find your polling location if you need it."}
{"No worries! If you change your mind, we're here to help."}
